items.title: Ghanaian footballer killed after armed attackers open fire at team bus
items.dek: The team was returning from a fixture when they were attacked by "masked men wielding guns and assault rifles", officials say.
items.body: The team was returning from a fixture when they were attacked by "masked men wielding guns and assault rifles", officials say.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Katya Adler: Jubilation in Budapest will be felt in Europe but leaves Moscow cold
items.dek: European leaders share Hungarians' joy over the ousting of Vladimir Putin's EU ally, writes the BBC's Europe editor.
items.body: European leaders share Hungarians' joy over the ousting of Vladimir Putin's EU ally, writes the BBC's Europe editor.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Britney Spears goes into rehab after driving under the influence arrest
items.dek: The singer voluntarily checks herself into a treatment facility, three weeks before her court date.
items.body: The singer voluntarily checks herself into a treatment facility, three weeks before her court date.
items.author: IriLine Desk
